Copy this code so that it can be entered into Neto."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel select "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the Crazy Egg add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Paste the code you copied previously, and click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "button."}]}]}]}]
